sourcesContent:
import React from 'react' import {Card,CardBody} from 'reactstrap'; import {Link} from 'react-router-dom'; import './tour-card.css' const TourCard = ({tour}) => { const {id, title, city, photo, price, featured, reviews}= tour const totalRating =reviews?.reduce((acc,item)=>acc + item.rating, 0) const avgrating=totalRating return (
{ featured && Featured}
{city} {avgRating}{" "} ({reviews.length})
{title}
${price} /per person
) } export default TourCard
